args.content:
Hawaii Vacation Packing List
=============================
Based on: Emma Johnson's Hawaii Vacation Itinerary
Dates: June 10th - June 20th, 2024

CLOTHING:
- Swimwear (multiple sets for beach days, snorkeling, kayaking)
- Casual outfits (for daily wear and dining)
- Aloha shirt or dress (for the Luau at Polynesian Cultural Center)
- Light jacket or sweater (for cooler evenings)
- Comfortable walking shoes (for Pearl Harbor, shopping at Ala Moana)
- Hiking shoes/boots (for Diamond Head hike)
- Flip-flops / sandals (for beach days)
- Hat or cap (sun protection)

BEACH & WATER GEAR:
- Sunscreen (reef-safe recommended for Hanauma Bay)
- Sunglasses
- Beach towel
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins)
- Water shoes (for kayaking at Kailua Beach)
- Dry bag (to protect valuables while kayaking)

HIKING GEAR:
- Hiking backpack/daypack
- Reusable water bottle
- Light snacks / energy bars
- Bug spray

TRAVEL ESSENTIALS:
- Travel documents (passport/ID, flight tickets, hotel reservations)
- Camera (for capturing memories)
- Phone charger / portable power bank
- Car charger (for the North Shore road trip)
- Map or GPS device

MISCELLANEOUS:
- Toiletries (shampoo, conditioner, body wash, toothbrush, toothpaste)
- Aloe vera gel / after-sun lotion
- First-aid kit
- Cash / credit cards
- Reusable shopping bag (for Ala Moana Center)

NOTES:
- June 11: Beach day at Waikiki Beach → Swimwear, sunscreen, towel
- June 12: Snorkeling at Hanauma Bay → Snorkeling gear, reef-safe sunscreen
- June 13: Hiking at Diamond Head → Hiking shoes, hat, water bottle
- June 14: Visit to Pearl Harbor → Comfortable shoes, respectful attire
- June 15: Road trip to the North Shore → Snacks, car charger
- June 16: Luau at Polynesian Cultural Center → Aloha attire
- June 17: Relaxation at hotel spa → Comfortable clothes
- June 18: Kayaking at Kailua Beach → Water shoes, dry bag
- June 19: Shopping at Ala Moana Center → Comfortable walking shoes
- June 20: Departure → All travel documents
